case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. RACHEL DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 514

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-26-2011, APPEEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S FIANCE. DEFENDANT'S FIANCE REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT RACHEL DAVIS IS ILL AND COULD NOT BE PRESENT TODAY. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON SEP-27-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR TRIAL AND FOR DEFENDANT RACHEL DAVIS TO BE PRESENT AND PROVIDE A DOCTOR'S NOTE TO THE COURT REGARDING HER ILLNESS. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
